title: Custom Machinery PneumaticCraft
body:
Custom Machinery PneumaticCraft is an addon of the [Custom Machinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-machinery) mod that add integration for [PneumaticCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/pneumaticcraft-repressurized).

This addon can be used to create a custom machine that can hold, consume or produce various PneumaticCraft elements, like pressure or temperature.

Obviously, this addon requires Custom Machinery and PneumaticCraft to be installed.


### Currently supported Mekanism features : 
- Pressure
 

This addon also brings full compatibility with KubeJS for creating machine recipes.
